creator: florian.millet@laposte.net
text:
Created attachment 241281
git diff for corosync-qdevice version 3.0.2

This is a patch to add new port corosync-qdevice to the latest version 3.0.2
(Tested ok on a custom poudriere repo on FreeBSD CURRENT)

This port is particularly useful when having even number of nodes in a Corosync cluster.
